testcase.name: Successfully register a new user
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the signup page............................................passed When User fills the registration form with details from signup properties...passed And User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account........................passed Then User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard....passed

testcase.name: Successfully request a password reset link
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the forgot password page...................................passed When User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link..passed Then User should see a confirmation for the reset link......................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in and creates a new client
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed And User navigates to client creation page and adds new client..............passed

testcase.name: Create a new contact under an existing client
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to client section and adds a new contact................passed Then New contact should be created successfully.............................passed

testcase.name: Add a new note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user adds a note for client.............................................passed

testcase.name: Edit the existing note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user edits the note for client..........................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user deletes the note for client........................................passed

testcase.name: Upload a new document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user uploads a document for client......................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the uploaded document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user deletes the document for client....................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to client and edit two fields
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to first client.........................................passed And user clicks edit button on client.......................................passed And user edits two fields of client.........................................passed And user scrolls and saves client changes...................................passed

testcase.name: Create a new Job
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to job section and adds a new job.......................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to job detail view
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed

testcase.name: Create a task in Task Manager
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user create a task......................................................passed

testcase.name: Edit a task in Task Manager
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user edits the task.....................................................passed

testcase.name: Delete a task in Task Manager
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user deletes the task...................................................passed

testcase.name: Create notes
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user adds a note........................................................passed

testcase.name: Note edit
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user edits the note.....................................................passed

testcase.name: User delete the note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user deletes the note...................................................passed

testcase.name: Upload documents
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user uploads a document.................................................passed

testcase.name: Delete document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed When user navigates to job detail view......................................passed When user navigates to engagement tab.......................................passed And user deletes the document...............................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to job and edit two fields
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to first job............................................passed And user clicks edit button on job..........................................passed And user edits two fields of job............................................passed And user scrolls and saves job changes......................................passed

testcase.name: add a new candidate
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User adds a new candidate..............................................passed Then New candidate should be created successfully...........................passed

testcase.name: Initialize candidate interview pipeline successfully

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[contains(., 'Initialize Pipeline') or contains(text(), 'Initialize')] (tried for 25 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-110-generic', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.40, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:34955}, goog:processID: 13856, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:34955/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.40, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: f05b6f1a95609d5700ac30890e3f5e44 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.job.JobInDetailViewPage.clickInitializePipeline(JobInDetailViewPage.java:156) at com.xats.automation.tests.stepdefinitions.job.InterviewPipelineSteps.user_clicks_on_initialize_pipeline_button(InterviewPipelineSteps.java:31) at ✽.User clicks on Initialize Pipeline button(file:///runner/_work/automation/automation/src/test/resources/features/5.pipeline/19_InterviewPipeline.feature:11)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands the candidate row with Submitted status....................passed And User clicks on Initialize Pipeline button...............................failed Then User should see success toast message "Pipeline Initialized"...........skipped

testcase.name: Mark candidate as passed successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Mark as Passed button and waits..........................passed

testcase.name: Revert candidate stage successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Revert Stage button......................................passed Then User should see success toast message "Stage Reverted".................passed

testcase.name: Skip candidate stage successfully with feedback
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Skip Stage button........................................passed And User clicks Add Feedback Now, enters feedback "Candidate is ready to skip this stage", and saves.passed

testcase.name: Create Permission Groups successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to Permission Groups in Settings........................passed And User clicks on New Group button.........................................passed And User enters permission group details from properties....................passed And User selects two checkboxes from properties.............................passed And User scrolls down and saves the permission group........................passed

testcase.name: Edit Permission Groups successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to Permission Groups in Settings........................passed And User clicks edit for the created permission group.......................passed And User changes the permission group name from properties..................passed And User saves the edited permission group..................................passed

testcase.name: Delete Permission Groups successfully

testcase.name: Create Role successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to Roles in Settings....................................passed And User clicks on Create Role button.......................................passed And User enters role details from properties................................passed And User selects permission group from properties...........................passed And User saves the role.....................................................passed

testcase.name: Delete Role successfully

testcase.name: Invite User successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to User Assignment in Settings..........................passed And User clicks on Invite User button.......................................passed And User enters user invitation details.....................................passed And User sends the invitation...............................................passed

testcase.name: Edit User Profile successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to User Assignment in Settings..........................passed And User clicks actions for the first user..................................passed And User clicks on Edit Profile option......................................passed And User enters updated profile details.....................................passed And User saves the profile changes..........................................passed

testcase.name: Delete User Account successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to User Assignment in Settings..........................passed And User clicks on Invite User button.......................................passed And User enters user invitation details.....................................passed And User sends the invitation...............................................passed And User searches for the invited user......................................passed And User clicks actions for the first user..................................passed And User clicks on Delete Account option....................................passed And User confirms delete user action........................................passed
